compressed_prompt: compose A regret-themed song in taylor swift style. provide lyrics and explain their meanings. use only english, in all caps.
response:
(SPOKEN, OVER A SOFT PIANO INTRODUCTION)
I KNOW THIS ROOM. I KNOW THIS VIEW.
THE LAST TIME I STOOD HERE, IT WAS ME AND YOU.
THE GHOST OF US IS DANCING ON THE CEILING.
AND I’M LEFT WITH JUST THE FEELING…

(VERSE 1)
THE CAKE WAS WHITE, THE DRESS WAS TOO
A SILHOUETTE AGAINST THE MORNING BLUE
YOU HELD MY HAND AND CALLED IT “ALWAYS”
I TRACED YOUR LAUGH LINES, LOST IN THAT MAZE
BUT THE BAND PLAYED ON, A SWEET PRETEND
A FAIRYTALE I FORCED TO NEVER END
I PICTURED GREY HAIR, PORCH SWINGS, GRANDKIDS
YOU SAW A BIRD IN A GILDED CAGE, AND YOU LIFTED THE LID.

(CHORUS)
AND IT’S A REGRETFUL KIND OF RAIN
FALLING ON THIS BROKEN WINDOW PANE
I WISHED ON EVERY STAR, I BLEW OUT EVERY FLAME
TO GET YOU BACK, BUT IT’S NOT THE SAME
‘CAUSE I WAS THE ARCHITECT, I DREW THE FAULT LINE
IN MARBLE FLOORS AND “I DO’S” AND GOOD WINE
I BUILT A HOUSE OF “SHOULD’VE’S” AND “NEVER’S”
AND NOW I WEAR THE ASHES OF “FOREVER.”

(VERSE 2)
I CHANGED THE NARRATIVE TO FIT THE SONG
TURNED ALL YOUR QUIET INTO “SOMETHING WRONG”
I CALLED YOU “DISTANT” WHEN YOU WERE JUST THINKING
POURED SALT IN WOUNDS INSTEAD OF LETTING THEM DRINK
YOU GAVE ME PEARLS, I ASKED FOR DIAMONDS
TRADED YOUR PEACEFUL NIGHTS FOR CITY LIGHTS AND BRAND-NEW ISLANDS
I PUSHED YOU TOWARD A VERSION OF “HAPPY”
THAT LOOKED JUST LIKE ME.

(CHORUS)
AND IT’S A REGRETFUL KIND OF RAIN
FALLING ON THIS BROKEN WINDOW PANE
I WISHED ON EVERY STAR, I BLEW OUT EVERY FLAME
TO GET YOU BACK, BUT IT’S NOT THE SAME
‘CAUSE I WAS THE ARCHITECT, I DREW THE FAULT LINE
IN MARBLE FLOORS AND “I DO’S” AND GOOD WINE
I BUILT A HOUSE OF “SHOULD’VE’S” AND “NEVER’S”
AND NOW I WEAR THE ASHES OF “FOREVER.”

(BRIDGE)
THE RING’S IN A DRAWER, A COLD SUN CATCHES THE STONE
I TURNED A HOME INTO A MUSEUM I WALK THROUGH ALONE
EVERY PHOTO A LIE, EVERY SMILE A LITTLE TOO WIDE
DID YOU KNOW, EVEN THEN, YOU WERE ALREADY OUTSIDE?
I HEAR AN ECHO OF “I DO” AND IT SOUNDS LIKE “WHY?”
THE ONLY GHOST HERE IS THE GIRL WHO WAS WILLING TO LIE.

(OUTRO)
IT’S A REGRETFUL, REGRETFUL, REGRETFUL THING…
TO BE THE ONE WHO SNAPPED THE WING
OF THE ONLY REAL LOVE YOU’D EVER KNOW.
AND THE WORST PART IS,
YOU LET ME GO.
YOU JUST LET ME GO.

---

**LYRICAL EXPLANATIONS (IN THE STYLE OF TAYLOR'S THEMATIC DEPTH):**

*   **"THE GHOST OF US IS DANCING ON THE CEILING"** - A VISUAL METAPHOR FOR THE MEMORY OF THE RELATIONSHIP HAUNTING HER, ELEVATED AND UNREACHABLE, YET STILL IN MOTION.

*   **"YOU SAW A BIRD IN A GILDED CAGE, AND YOU LIFTED THE LID"** - ACKNOWLEDGES THAT HER PARTNER FELT TRAPPED BY HER VERSION OF A PERFECT LIFE. THE REGRET IS THAT SHE WAS THE ONE WHO BUILT THE CAGE, AND HE WAS KIND ENOUGH TO SET HIMSELF FREE INSTEAD OF BREAKING IT.

*   **"I WAS THE ARCHITECT, I DREW THE FAULT LINE"** - THE CORE METAPHOR OF THE SONG. SHE FULLY ACCEPTS BLAME. SHE DESIGNED THE RELATIONSHIP'S FLAWS ("FAULT LINE") WITHIN THE LUXURIOUS TRAPPINGS OF THEIR LIFE ("MARBLE FLOORS AND 'I DO'S' AND GOOD WINE").

*   **"I BUILT A HOUSE OF 'SHOULD'VE'S' AND 'NEVER'S'"** - THE RELATIONSHIP IS NOW RETROSPECTIVELY SEEN NOT AS A HOME, BUT AS A FRAGILE CONSTRUCTION BUILT ON HER INSECURITIES AND UNREALISTIC EXPECTATIONS.

*   **"I PUSHED YOU TOWARD A VERSION OF 'HAPPY' THAT LOOKED JUST LIKE ME"** - A CRUCIAL LINE SHOWING SELF-AWARENESS. HER LOVE WAS CONTROLLING AND SELF-CENTERED; SHE WANTED HIM TO BE HAPPY ONLY IN THE WAYS THAT MADE *HER* HAPPY.

*   **"I TURNED A HOME INTO A MUSEUM I WALK THROUGH ALONE"** - THE RELATIONSHIP IS NOW A FROZEN, CURATED EXHIBIT OF WHAT SHE WANTED IT TO BE, NOT WHAT IT WAS. SHE'S THE LONELY TOURIST OF HER OWN MISTAKE.

*   **"THE ONLY GHOST HERE IS THE GIRL WHO WAS WILLING TO LIE"** - THE TWIST. THE HAUNTING PRESENCE ISN'T THE LOST LOVE, BUT HER OWN PAST SELF WHO LIED TO HERSELF ABOUT THE NATURE OF THEIR LOVE.

*   **"YOU LET ME GO. YOU JUST LET ME GO."** - THE FINAL, DEVASTATING REALIZATION. HIS ACT OF LEAVING WAS NOT AN ACT OF ANGER, BUT OF RESIGNATION AND SADNESS. THE GREATEST REGRET IS THAT HE DIDN'T EVEN FIGHT, BECAUSE HE KNEW SHE COULDN'T CHANGE THE FOUNDATION SHE HERSELF BUILT WRONG.
